bird.name: Tuamotu sandpiper
bird.summary: The Tuamotu sandpiper (Prosobonia parvirostris) is an endangered member of the large wader family Scolopacidae, that is endemic to the Tuam…

relations.subject: Tuamotu sandpiper
relations.evidence: This bird lives on undisturbed atolls where it feeds in open areas, including the shores and beaches, and scrubland; it is more rarely found in Pandanus thickets
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Tuamotu sandpiper
relations.evidence: The Tuamotu sandpiper is threatened by introduced rats and habitat destruction caused by the spreading cultivation of coconuts, and is listed as endangered
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
